description:
2025 Cadillac Escalade Sport Platinum 600, 6.2 Supercharged V8, AWD, 420bhp, 10 Speed Automatic. AED 469,000 or AED 7,348 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 15,157 KM's - Cadillac Warranty Valid Until 9th August 2030 - Cadillac Service Contract Valid Until 9th August 2030 - Full Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Electric Memory Seats - 24" Alloy Wheels - Air Ride Adaptive Suspension - Rear Entertainment System - Dual Zone Climate Control - Glass Panoramic Sunroof - Soft Close Doors - Adaptive Cruise Control - HD Surround Vision - Apple Carlay - Bluetooth Connectivity - Satellite Navigation
